package rulecoverage

func PositiveResponseDtoOutsideTransportPackage() string {
    ruleID := "response_dto_outside_transport_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Response envelope structs that live in persistence or repository packages instead of transport or API contract packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
